cooperates.cooperate_desc:
The combo between Wanwan and Franco is one of the best because it perfectly combines crowd control and high burst damage Franco can easily hook an enemy out of position and suppress them with his ultimate Bloody Hunt completely disabling them for a few seconds This gives Wanwan the perfect opportunity to attack freely without worrying about enemy movement or counterplay

Wanwan passive ability Tiger Pace allows her to target enemy weak points dealing bonus true damage If Franco hooks an enemy and holds them in place Wanwan can quickly hit all weak points and activate her ultimate Crossbow of Tang This makes it easy for her to secure kills and even reset her ultimate for continuous eliminations

Franco also provides strong frontline protection allowing Wanwan to safely position herself and deal damage from the backline His crowd control helps reduce the risk of enemies diving onto Wanwan giving her more space to maneuver and activate her mobility skills

Overall this combo ensures that priority targets are easily locked down and eliminated making it a deadly combination in both early and late game team fights

The combo between Selena and Franco is one of the most powerful because it maximizes crowd control and pickoff potential Franco can use his Iron Hook to pull an enemy out of position and immediately follow up with his ultimate Bloody Hunt to suppress them completely This guarantees that Selena can land her Abyssal Arrow without any chance for the enemy to dodge

Selena Abyssal Arrow stuns enemies for a long duration depending on the travel distance When Franco hooks and suppresses an enemy Selena can time her arrow to hit right after the suppression ends extending the total duration of crowd control This makes it almost impossible for the enemy to escape giving both heroes and their team an easy kill

In addition Selena Abyssal Traps provide vision which helps Franco land more accurate hooks By placing traps in bushes and key areas Franco can predict enemy movement and set up better ambushes

This combo is extremely effective in the early game for aggressive pickoffs and ganks leading to strong map control and early kills making Franco and Selena one of the deadliest roaming duos

The combo between Gusion and Franco is one of the deadliest because it combines strong crowd control with high burst damage Franco can use his Iron Hook to pull an enemy out of position and immediately follow up with Bloody Hunt to suppress them completely This gives Gusion a perfect opportunity to land all his daggers and burst down the target before they can react

Gusion relies on quick and precise skill combos to eliminate enemies Franco crowd control ensures that his targets are completely immobilized making it easier for Gusion to land his Sword Spike and follow up with Shadowblade Slaughter without missing his attacks This guarantees that his full combo deals maximum damage securing a quick kill

Franco also helps Gusion safely engage and escape fights Gusion is an assassin who needs to dive into the enemy backline to eliminate key targets Franco hook can isolate priority enemies making it easier for Gusion to take them down without getting interrupted

This combo is especially effective against squishy heroes like mages and marksmen because Franco disables them completely while Gusion burst damage eliminates them instantly making them one of the strongest pickoff duos in the game

The combo between Granger and Franco is one of the strongest because it combines powerful crowd control with high burst damage Franco can use his Iron Hook to pull an enemy out of position and follow up with Bloody Hunt to completely suppress them This guarantees that Granger can freely unload his full combo without any risk of the enemy escaping or counterattacking

Granger deals massive burst damage with his first skill Rhapsody and ultimate Death Sonata When Franco locks down an enemy Granger can instantly fire his bullets ensuring that every shot hits its target This is especially effective against squishy heroes like mages and marksmen who cannot survive the combined damage

Franco also provides protection for Granger in team fights As a marksman Granger relies on positioning to deal damage safely Franco presence discourages enemies from diving onto him allowing Granger to focus on dealing high damage without constantly repositioning

This combo excels in both early and late game making it one of the best for securing kills and controlling objectives through strong pickoff potential and high burst damage

The combo between Zhuxin and Franco is extremely powerful because it combines deadly crowd control with sustained damage over time Franco can use his Iron Hook to pull an enemy out of position and immediately follow up with Bloody Hunt to suppress them completely This guarantees that Zhuxin can unleash her full combo without any risk of the enemy escaping

Zhuxin relies on her burn damage and chain crowd control to wear down enemies When Franco locks down a target Zhuxin can easily land her abilities and apply her damage over time effects making it nearly impossible for enemies to survive Even if they do escape they will still take heavy damage from her abilities

Franco also provides frontline protection allowing Zhuxin to position safely in fights His presence forces enemies to think twice before engaging on her giving her more freedom to cast her skills and maximize her damage output

This combo is highly effective in both early and late game ensuring strong pickoff potential and sustained damage making Franco and Zhuxin a dangerous duo in any fight

The combo between Novaria and Franco is highly effective because it combines powerful crowd control with long-range burst damage Franco can use his Iron Hook to pull an enemy out of position and follow up with Bloody Hunt to completely suppress them This guarantees that Novaria can fully charge and land her Astral Meteor dealing massive damage while the enemy is immobilized

Novaria excels at dealing high magic damage from a distance but she needs time to charge her abilities Franco crowd control ensures that her attacks hit their target without interference When Franco locks down an enemy Novaria can unleash her Astral Echo and enhanced basic attacks to deal consistent burst damage

Franco also provides frontline protection for Novaria allowing her to stay at a safe distance while dealing damage His presence discourages enemies from diving onto her giving her more freedom to reposition and maximize her damage output

This combo is especially strong in team fights and pickoff situations because Franco forces enemies into a vulnerable position while Novaria punishes them with long-range magic damage making them a deadly duo for controlling objectives and eliminating key targets

counters.counter_desc:
Atlas is one of the most effective counters to Franco because of his strong crowd control and ability to disrupt Franco positioning When Franco tries to hook an enemy Atlas can counter engage with his skills to turn the fight around

Atlas second skill Perfect Match allows him to split from his body and reposition quickly making it difficult for Franco to land a hook Even if Franco hooks Atlas Atlas can activate his enhanced form to gain extra defense and survive the attack

Atlas ultimate Fatal Links is a powerful counter to Franco If Franco hooks and suppresses an enemy Atlas can use Fatal Links to grab multiple enemies and throw them together disrupting Franco control and creating an opportunity for his team to follow up This is especially effective in team fights where Franco wants to isolate a single target but Atlas can force multiple enemies into a bad position instead

Atlas also has strong durability and mobility which makes it hard for Franco to control him for long His tankiness allows him to withstand Franco attacks while his skills let him reposition and engage when needed

Overall Atlas is a great counter to Franco because he can resist hooks survive suppression and turn fights in his team favor with strong area control

Kaja is one of the strongest counters to Franco because of his ability to suppress Franco before Franco can use his own suppression skill Kaja ultimate Divine Judgment is an instant suppression that prevents Franco from using Bloody Hunt or escaping after missing a hook

Kaja also has strong mobility with his second skill Lightning Bomb allowing him to quickly reposition and avoid Franco hooks Even if Franco manages to hook Kaja he can still use his ultimate to suppress Franco and pull him into his team turning the fight around

Another advantage of Kaja is his passive Wrath Sanction which enhances his basic attacks with extra magic damage This allows Kaja to deal consistent damage while disrupting Franco making it harder for Franco to sustain in fights

Kaja is also effective at isolating Franco from his team If Franco positions too aggressively Kaja can use Divine Judgment to pull him into enemy territory where Franco can be easily burst down before he can use his crowd control

Overall Kaja is an efficient counter to Franco because of his instant suppression strong mobility and ability to punish Franco for missing a hook or overcommitting to a fight

Johnson is a decent counter to Franco because of his high mobility strong engage potential and ability to disrupt Franco positioning His ultimate Rapid Touchdown allows him to crash into Franco and his team stunning them and preventing Franco from setting up his hooks effectively If Franco is caught in the impact he can be easily targeted and taken down before he can use his crowd control skills

Johnson is also highly durable making him difficult for Franco to pick off Even if Franco hooks him Johnson can absorb a lot of damage due to his high defense and shield from his passive Electro airbag This makes him less vulnerable compared to squishy heroes that Franco usually targets

Additionally Johnson pairs well with burst damage heroes like Odette or Xavier If Franco is caught by Rapid Touchdown the follow up damage from Johnson teammate can quickly eliminate him before he can react Johnson mobility also allows him to reposition quickly avoiding Franco hooks and counter engaging whenever Franco tries to make a pickoff

Overall Johnson counters Franco by disrupting his setup reducing his effectiveness in isolating targets and creating opportunities for his team to engage before Franco can make an impact

Kadita is a strong counter to Franco because of her high mobility immunity to crowd control and burst damage Her second skill Breath of the Ocean allows her to stun Franco if he tries to engage making it difficult for him to land hooks safely If Franco hooks and suppresses her she can still survive due to her passive Thalassophobia which restores her health after a short delay

Kadita first skill Ocean Oddity makes her immune to crowd control while she is in water form This allows her to escape Franco suppression or avoid getting hooked in the first place She can also use this skill to reposition quickly making it hard for Franco to predict her movement and land his hook accurately

Her ultimate Rough Waves deals massive burst damage in an area which can punish Franco if he tries to fight in close range Since Franco lacks mobility and magic resistance Kadita can quickly burst him down before he can escape

Overall Kadita counters Franco by using her crowd control immunity high mobility and strong burst damage to survive his initiation and turn the fight against him

Lylia is a strong counter to Franco because of her high mobility strong wave clear and ability to escape his crowd control Her second skill Angry Gloom allows her to deal continuous burst damage in an area making it dangerous for Franco to approach If Franco tries to hook her she can quickly reposition using her first skill Magic Shockwave which boosts her movement speed and helps her avoid getting caught

Her ultimate Black Shoes is one of the best tools against Franco If Franco hooks and suppresses her she can instantly return to her previous position and restore her health completely negating his attempt to lock her down This makes it very difficult for Franco to secure kills on her as she can always reset her positioning

Lylia also has strong poke damage and fast wave clear which makes it harder for Franco to roam freely She can constantly pressure lanes and force Franco to react reducing his ability to set up hooks and pick off her teammates

Overall Lylia counters Franco by using her mobility burst damage and ability to escape suppression making it difficult for him to land effective hooks and secure kills

Grock is a strong counter to Franco because of his high durability crowd control resistance and ability to block Franco hooks using his skills His passive Earthen Force gives him extra durability when near walls making it harder for Franco to burst him down if he gets hooked

Grock first skill Power of Nature grants him crowd control immunity when fully charged This means that even if Franco hooks him Grock can use this skill to avoid being suppressed and fight back immediately The knockback effect can also disrupt Franco positioning preventing him from easily setting up his combos

His second skill Guardian Barrier is one of the best tools against Franco Grock can use it to create a wall and block Franco hooks preventing him from pulling important targets This makes it much harder for Franco to isolate enemies and secure pickoffs

Grock ultimate Wild Charge allows him to engage and disrupt team fights before Franco can land a good hook The knock up effect can stop Franco from using his skills effectively and force him to reposition

Overall Grock counters Franco by using his crowd control immunity strong durability and ability to block hooks making it very difficult for Franco to control the battlefield and secure key targets

dominants.dominant_desc:
Franco Best Tips and Tricks

Master Hook Accuracy
Franco Iron Hook is his most important skill so practice landing it consistently Predict enemy movements and aim slightly ahead of their path to increase accuracy Hide in bushes to surprise enemies and use the map terrain to hook enemies over walls

Use Flicker for Surprise Plays
Combine Flicker with Iron Hook or Bloody Hunt to catch enemies off guard Flicker forward before using Bloody Hunt to secure a suppression on high priority targets You can also Flicker backward after hooking an enemy to pull them deeper into your team

Abuse Bushes and Vision Control
Franco is most dangerous when enemies do not know where he is Stay hidden in bushes to create pressure and force enemies to play cautiously Even if you do not land hooks your presence alone can make enemies hesitate to move freely

Secure Early Kills and Objectives
At level one go near the enemy jungle or mid lane to look for an early hook A successful early pickoff can delay the enemy jungler or mid laner Always help secure the Turtle by zoning enemies with your hooks and crowd control

Punish Enemy Mistakes
Wait for enemies to overextend before using your skills Hooking an enemy out of position forces them to use battle spells like Flicker or Purify If they have no escape Franco can easily secure a kill with his team

Disrupt the Enemy Backline
In team fights aim to hook enemy damage dealers like marksmen or mages If you manage to catch them use Bloody Hunt immediately to prevent them from escaping or dealing damage This can turn the fight in your team favor instantly

Roam Efficiently
Do not stay in one lane for too long Keep moving between mid lane gold lane and jungle to create pressure Your presence alone can force enemies to play defensively which benefits your team

Build According to the Match
If the enemy team has strong crowd control or burst damage build defensive items like Athena Shield or Radiant Armor If your team lacks durability consider Guardia
dominants.dominant_title: Franco Early Game Guide from Level One to Level Four  Level One At the start of the game take Iron Hook as your first skill Position yourself in the mid lane bush or near the enemy jungle to look for

emblems.emblem_desc:
The emblem chosen for Franco is the Support Emblem because it provides utility and enhances his ability to assist the team effectively As a tank Franco does not rely on high damage but rather on crowd control and team coordination The Support Emblem gives him extra durability movement speed and cooldown reduction allowing him to perform his role more efficiently

For the first talent Agility is the best choice because it increases movement speed This helps Franco position himself better for landing hooks and engaging or disengaging from fights faster

For the second talent Pull Yourself Together is the most effective option because it reduces the cooldown of battle spells and equipment This is especially useful for Franco since he relies heavily on Flicker to execute surprise hooks or reposition during fights The faster he can use Flicker again the more impact he can have in the game

For the final talent Focusing Mark is selected because it increases the damage dealt by allies to an enemy whenever Franco deals damage to them This is highly beneficial for a tank like Franco who frequently initiates fights and marks key enemies for his team to focus on By using his hook and ultimate on priority targets he enables his teammates to deal increased damage and secure kills more easily

Overall this emblem and talent combination maximizes Franco ability to control enemies initiate fights and support his team by enhancing their damage output and reducing his cooldowns

equips.equip_desc:
Best Item Build for Franco

Rapid Boots Conceal
Provides high movement speed allowing Franco to roam and position himself better Conceal effect helps him initiate surprise hooks and ambush enemies

Fleeting Time
Reduces the cooldown of Franco ultimate Bloody Hunt after securing an assist or kill allowing him to use his suppression skill more frequently in fights

Antique Cuirass
Reduces the physical attack of enemies who hit Franco making it effective against marksmen and physical damage dealers increasing his durability in fights

Immortality
Grants Franco a second chance by reviving him after death making it harder for enemies to eliminate him permanently and allowing him to continue disrupting fights

Athenas Shield
Provides magic defense and a shield that activates after taking magic damage making it an essential item against mages who deal high burst damage

Guardian Helmet
Grants high HP and passive health regeneration allowing Franco to stay longer in fights and sustain himself without frequently returning to base

This build makes Franco a durable frontline initiator giving him the tools to engage disrupt and survive long battles

hero.hero_overview:
Hero Overview Franco the Icebound Butcher

Franco is a tank hero in Mobile Legends known for his exceptional crowd control abilities and deadly pickoff potential With his signature skill Iron Hook he can single handedly turn the tide of battle by isolating key enemies and dragging them into his teams grasp His playstyle revolves around precise positioning patience and mastery of his hook mechanics to create opportunities that can secure victory for his team

Franco hails from the frozen north embodying the raw power of an unstoppable juggernaut His presence on the battlefield strikes fear into his enemies as a single misstep can lead to their doom Unlike most tanks Franco does not rely on sheer durability alone Instead he thrives on disrupting the enemy formation and eliminating priority targets before a fight even begins His crowd control abilities make him an essential initiator allowing his team to capitalize on every successful hook he lands

His first skill Iron Hook is the defining feature of his kit With pinpoint accuracy Franco can throw his massive hook in a straight line grabbing the first enemy it touches and pulling them toward him This ability makes him a nightmare for squishy damage dealers and immobile heroes as getting caught often leads to certain death

His second skill Fury Shock enhances his control capabilities by slowing and dealing damage to nearby enemies While not as game changing as his hook it serves as a useful tool for keeping enemies locked in place allowing Franco and his team to secure an easy kill

Francos ultimate Bloody Hunt is one of the most devastating crowd control abilities in the game Once he locks onto a target there is no escape The skill suppresses the enemy rendering them completely helpless as Franco delivers a flurry of attacks This makes him one of the best counters against slippery heroes who rely on mobility to survive
hero.hero_strength:
Franco is a powerful tank hero with deadly crowd control abilities He excels at picking off enemies and disrupting fights with his signature skill Iron Hook which pulls a target towards him His presence alone forces enemies to stay on guard as a single mistake can lead to their defeat

Franco is a juggernaut from the frozen north relying on precise hooks and brutal control instead of pure durability His skill set includes Iron Hook for grabbing enemies Fury Shock for slowing them and Bloody Hunt for completely suppressing a target making him one of the best initiators and playmakers in battle
hero.hero_weakness: Franco awakens his true power becoming an unstoppable force on the battlefield His hooks become faster and deadlier his body reinforced with unbreakable ice Every pull is a guaranteed demise for his enemies and his presence alone instills fear in the hearts of those who stand against him

data.recommend: BEST BUILD FRANCO + TRICK AND TIPS

spell.spell_desc:
Flicker is the best spell for Franco because it enhances his ability to catch enemies and initiate fights effectively Franco relies on precise positioning to land his Iron Hook and Flicker allows him to quickly adjust his angle making it harder for enemies to predict or dodge his attacks It also lets him perform surprise hooks by suddenly changing his position catching opponents off guard

Another major advantage is its synergy with his ultimate Bloody Hunt Franco can use Flicker to instantly close the gap and suppress a key enemy before they have a chance to escape This makes it one of the best ways to secure kills on high value targets like marksmen and mages who rely on positioning to stay safe

Flicker also gives Franco an escape option which he naturally lacks If he finds himself in a dangerous situation he can quickly reposition to avoid getting focused by enemies making him much harder to punish after missing a hook or engaging in a risky fight

data.title: The Icebound Butcher

emblems.emblem_desc: Basic Common emblem is a life saver for franco in early game to late game because of it fast mana regeneration which is crucial for team fight. Common emblem also work great with franco passive regeneration which could lead franco in to stay longer in team fight. This emblem build is great for franco because of it high mobility with "Agility" , fast spell cool down with "Pull Yourself Together" and a burst magic damage with "Concussive Blast" which work better with franco tanky built.

equips.equip_desc: This build work great with a lots of burst damage enemy or tanky enemy because of it great mobility from roam and emblem that could help with staying in team fight longer or to check map.

This build focus on high mobility enemy or you want to dive in to enemy back line with many stun enemy because of winter crown new passive that let you use your ultimate and stay immune to any kind of stun or crowd control.

hero.hero_overview: Franco is one of the the hardest hero to master for beginners. But with proper timing and experience you can master him in just a couple of game.
hero.hero_strength: Franco is one of the hero with fast rotation ability which help you engage in more team fight and support your team. Franco can be strong with an aggressive play with his hook and suppression ultimate that can lead to a game changing battle for teams. With his fast regeneration ability he can stay on battle way longer for team fight.
hero.hero_weakness: he have one weakness it that he easily ran out of mana which is crucial for team fight but with the right emblem that will be no problem and for early game avoid team fight because early game Franco is very squishy.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is franco best friend because it could help franco in many situations that need franco to make play inorder to change the situation of the game. You could perform many different combo with Franco and flicker such as hook + Flicker or Flicker + ultimate or many more inorder to secure the win.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Mia is a long-range hero who can take down Mia's special sting with Franco, which can catch any hero in Mia's range when stinging him, and easily automatically hooks him when stinging Mia.

counters.counter_desc: She is a heroine who can resist Franco and his special hooks, escape from him, and kill him with ease. She is the antidote to all of Franco's special hooks.

hero.hero_overview: Franco is a formidable Tank hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, renowned for his exceptional crowd control abilities and game-changing potential.
hero.hero_strength: Franco is a powerful tank hero with unique strengths that make him a valuable asset to any team. His ability to control the battlefield and disrupt enemy strategies can be a game-changer in the right hands.
hero.hero_weakness: Franco is a high-risk, high-reward hero. If his hook lands, he can set up crucial kills for his team. However, his weaknesses can be easily exploited by skilled opponents, making him a situational pick in certain team compositions.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Using high burst potential heroes like eudora and nana etc. is highly recommended because with heroes like them you can finish off enemies at the movement when he get his hooks

counters.counter_desc: Heroes with anti crowd control or immune skills is big counter to him most of the cc skills can also counter his ultimate bloody hunt

dominants.dominant_desc:
Use your hook (Iron Hook) to disrupt enemy farming and secure early kills.
Focus on roaming between lanes to gank and protect squishy allies.

Stick with your team and aim to hook priority targets like mages or marksmen.
Use your Flicker + Bloody Hunt combo to disable enemies instantly.

Stay in the frontline, absorbing damage and creating opportunities for your team to eliminate key threats.

Dont waste your hook; aim carefully to capitalize on mispositioned enemies.

1.	Hook + Basic Attack + Bloody Hunt:

Perfect for locking down and bursting a single target.

2.	Flicker + Bloody Hunt:

Flicker into the enemys backline and immediately use your ultimate to secure their damage dealer.

3.	Zoning with Iron Hook:

Even if you dont land hooks, the threat alone forces enemies to reposition, giving your team map control.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Vitality (Increases max HP for better durability)
Tenacity (Increases defense when HP is below 40%, ensuring survival).
Focusing Mark (buff allies when dealing damage).
Agility and wilderness blessings will allow you to rotate across the map more quickly for ganking effectively and concussive blast will provide with additional damage while doing basic attacks
Using support emblem with inspire and pull yourself together will provide cd reduction and also give faster regeneration combined with brave smite allows additional hp recovery while using skills

equips.equip_desc: This building only focuses on endurance and sustainability its recommended to switch the position of the equipment accordingly to the situation
This building is more focused on dealing damage and recovering health as well as cd reduction but this is a situation build only its recommended not to use this if you doing solo queue

hero.hero_overview: Franco is a tank hero with excellent crowd control and the ability to hook enemies, making him a great initiator and a disruptor in team fights.
hero.hero_strength: Franco excels in crowd control with his Iron Hook and Bloody Hunt, making him a great initiator and disabler. He has excellent early-game presence for ganking, strong zoning potential, and can become a durable tank with the right build
hero.hero_weakness: Franco is highly skill-dependent, as missing hooks reduces his impact significantly. He has low mobility, making him vulnerable to kiting, and his damage output is limited, relying heavily on his team to secure kills.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker allows you to reposition quickly for surprise hooks or to escape dangerous situations. Its especially useful for chaining your ultimate (Bloody Hunt) after hooking a priority target.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: The best hero that synergize Franco. Novaria's ultimate will make hit point bigger making hooking enemies easier add to it the vision provided by Novaria's ultimate is a great help to hook hiding enemies.

counters.counter_desc: Angela is the best counter to Franco, not only that it can save enemies on pick off but it give time to enemies to respond and counter initiate.

dominants.dominant_desc: In early game make sure to hook enemies buff to delay it. Even you did not get the buff it adds delay to enemies jungler and making your jungler ahead in level and farm. In mid game on turtle fight make sure to use flicker, bloody hunt and winter crown combo to secure lord or turtle. In late game change roam boots to conceal and hunt enemies marksman and use the same combo.

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem set is good for Franco since he need to roam around the map getting pick off and hooking jungle creeps. Hook, ultimate and concussive blast is a great combo to kill reduce enemies HP specially marksman or assassin.

equips.equip_desc: This build is more on pick off and initiation. Choosing encourage makes fleeting time trigger it's passive even you're just standing in clash because of its passive aura. More assist lesser wait time to suppress enemies again making this build deadly. Add winter crown for flicker bloody hunt, making you an unstoppable intiator.

hero.hero_overview: Roam hero that excel in suppressing fast moving assassin and invading enemies jungle.
hero.hero_strength: Franco's strength suppressing  agile heroes such as joy, fanny, nolan etc. Good in delaying jungle's farm by hooking buffs.
hero.hero_weakness: Franco is not that tanky like other tank roam heroes. When playing Franco you need patience and accuracy to hook enemies to make game advantage.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is the best spell for Franco, it synergize with his skills. Combining flicker with hook or bloody hunt makes Franco a deadly roam.

dominants.dominant_desc:
-Master the Hook: Landing a successful Iron Hook is crucial for Franco's effectiveness. Practice in AI or custom mode to improve your accuracy. 
-Initiate Wisely: Franco's lack of escape skills makes him vulnerable. Choose your initiation carefully and ensure your team is ready to follow up. 
-Target Squishy Heroes: Franco's skills are best used against heroes with low HP, such as marksmen and mages.
-Coordinate with Your Team: Communicate with your team to maximize your impact.
dominants.dominant_title: Tips on how to play Franco like Pro

emblems.emblem_desc: - Emblem: Choose the Support emblem for Franco. In the first tier, select Agility for increased movement speed. In the second tier, pick Pull Yourself Together to reduce the cooldown of your battle spell and equipment actives. Finally, opt for Focusing Mark in the last tier to increase your allies' damage to your target.

-Agility, for quick gank rotation focuses on eliminating single target. 
-Master Assassin, solo gank/kill highly focused on single target. 
-Focusing Mark, rely on team/nearby allies damage.
emblems.emblem_title: Solo Gank/Kill | Ambush Position | Bush Mastery

equips.equip_desc: This item composition focuses on Franco's initiation, CC, cooldown and fast rotation, making his enemies fear him in the battlefield.
equips.equip_title: Clash Initiator | Ambush & Fast gank rotation

hero.hero_overview: Franco, know for his excels at initiating clash, disrupting enemies, and controlling the battlefield. This comprehensive guide will cover Franco's skills, recommended emblem, best battle spell, optimal build, and effective combos.
hero.hero_strength:
Franco's strength lies in his ability to control the battlefield and disrupt enemy movements. 
 
- Powerful Initiation: Franco's Iron Hook is a game-changer.  He can pull enemies into his team's range, setting up kills and forcing fights on his terms. This makes him a valuable asset for initiating teamfights.
- Strong Crowd Control: His ultimate skill, Bloody Hunt,  suppresses the enemy for a significant duration, making them completely helpless.
hero.hero_weakness:
- Hook Accuracy:  His Iron Hook is a high-risk, high-reward skill. Missing the hook can leave him out of position and vulnerable. Mastering the hook's timing and range is crucial.
- Limited Damage: Franco is primarily a tank/support, meaning. He relies on his team to deal the majority of the damage.
- Ultimate Duration: While Bloody Hunt is strong, its duration is relatively short. If your team can't capitalize on the suppression within that time, the enemy might escape.

spell.spell_desc:
- Battle Spell: Flicker is the perfect battle spell for Franco. It allows you to pull enemies further with Iron Hook, increase the hook's range. 
- You can easily pull a flicker + hook combo or flicker + Bloody Hunt to surprise the nearby enemies.
